column1: # Smoke set — 50 placeholder segment IDs used by EXP-001 to prove the
# distillation loop closes end-to-end.  The audioset.py loader generates
# deterministic synthetic audio for any ytid prefixed `_smoke_`
# file exercises the real CSV → loader → teacher → student → KL plumbing
# without any network access.  Real curated AudioSet IDs land in Phase 3
# Class budget: 30 crying_sobbing · 10 speech · 5 silence · 5 babbling.
# Format mirrors the public eval_segments.csv: ytid
